metadata.name: loyal_core
metadata.description: loyal.fun core program: closed-loop $LOYAL points, risk vaults, cNFT coupons, soulbound badges

instructions.name: buy_reward
docs: Buys a reward: burns the price and mints a coupon cNFT (Bubblegum CPI)
to the buyer.

accounts.name: tree_config
docs: validates it against the merkle tree in the CPI.

instructions.name: claim_badge
docs: Claims an unlocked achievement as a soulbound (NonTransferable)
Token-2022 badge token.

accounts.name: badge_mint
docs: Token-2022 mint on the first claim of this badge type.

accounts.name: user_badge_ata
docs: handler and the account is created idempotently via CPI.

instructions.name: close_position
docs: Settles an open position at the current Pyth price:
`payout = stake × clamp(1 + L·Δ, 0, 5)`, minus the burn fee.

instructions.name: create_listing
docs: Merchant lists a real-world reward purchasable with points.

instructions.name: create_vault
docs: Creates a risk vault tracking one Pyth feed (admin).

instructions.name: initialize_config
docs: Bootstraps the protocol: creates the $LOYAL Token-2022 mint
(TransferHook + MetadataPointer + TokenMetadata, authority = config
PDA) and writes the global config.

accounts.name: loyal_mint
docs: TransferHook + MetadataPointer + TokenMetadata extensions.

accounts.name: hook_program
docs: the mint's TransferHook extension.

instructions.name: issue_points
docs: Mints points to a customer against a merchant-signed QR payload.
Requires a preceding Ed25519Program verification instruction; replay
is blocked by the nonce marker PDA, screenshot-sharing by the expiry.

accounts.name: user
docs: The customer scanning the QR. Pays for the nonce marker + profile rent
(in practice the relayer is the fee payer; rent comes from the payer).

accounts.name: nonce_account
docs: Replay guard: `init` on a deterministic (merchant, nonce) address fails
the second time the same QR is submitted.

instructions.name: liquidate_position
docs: Permissionless crank: anyone may liquidate a position whose multiplier
decayed to ≤ 0.2x, earning a 1% bounty. The owner keeps the floor value
and earns the 💀 badge.

accounts.name: liquidator
docs: Anyone may crank a drowned position — permissionless keeper surface.

accounts.name: position_owner
docs: and used as ATA authority below. Not required to sign.

instructions.name: open_position
docs: Opens a synthetic position: burns the stake, records the Pyth entry
price (staleness + confidence checked). Leverage ∈ {1, 2, 5}.
CPI-friendly: other programs can build on this permissionlessly.

accounts.name: price_update
docs: owner, feed id, staleness and confidence are all validated in
`read_price_1e6`.

instructions.name: redeem_reward
docs: Redeems a coupon at the till: burns the cNFT (user + merchant both
sign) and writes a RedemptionReceipt so it can never be reused.

accounts.name: user
docs: The coupon holder — must sign (they hand their phone QR to the till).

accounts.name: merchant_authority
docs: The shop's wallet — must also sign, proving redemption happened at the
counter and not by a screenshot replay.

accounts.name: receipt
docs: Double-spend guard: one receipt per asset id, ever.

instructions.name: register_merchant
docs: Registers a shop with its off-chain QR signing key.

instructions.name: set_coupon_tree
docs: Records the Bubblegum merkle tree used for coupon cNFTs (admin).

instructions.name: set_merchant_active
docs: Enables/disables a merchant (admin).

instructions.name: set_paused
docs: Emergency stop (admin). Gates every user-facing instruction.

instructions.name: set_vault_active
docs: Enables/disables a vault (admin).

instructions.name: update_merchant_signer
docs: Rotates a merchant's QR signing key (merchant authority).

errors.name: Paused
errors.msg: Protocol is paused

errors.name: AdminOnly
errors.msg: Only the config admin may call this instruction

errors.name: MerchantInactive
errors.msg: Merchant is not active

errors.name: VaultInactive
errors.msg: Vault is not active

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Numeric overflow

errors.name: QrExpired
errors.msg: QR code has expired

errors.name: QrTtlTooLong
errors.msg: QR expiry is unreasonably far in the future

errors.name: IssueCapExceeded
errors.msg: Points amount exceeds the per-transaction issuance cap

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Points amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: MissingEd25519Instruction
errors.msg: Missing ed25519 signature-verification instruction before issue_points

errors.name: MalformedEd25519Instruction
errors.msg: Malformed ed25519 verification instruction

errors.name: QrSignerMismatch
errors.msg: QR signature was not produced by the merchant's registered signer

errors.name: QrPayloadMismatch
errors.msg: Signed QR payload does not match the instruction arguments

errors.name: StalePrice
errors.msg: Oracle price is stale

errors.name: LowConfidencePrice
errors.msg: Oracle confidence interval is too wide

errors.name: InvalidPrice
errors.msg: Oracle price is non-positive

errors.name: FeedMismatch
errors.msg: Price account does not match the vault's configured feed

errors.name: InvalidLeverage
errors.msg: Leverage must be 1, 2 or 5 and within the configured maximum

errors.name: StakeCapExceeded
errors.msg: Stake exceeds the vault's per-position cap

errors.name: GlobalExposureCapExceeded
errors.msg: Global open exposure cap reached; try again later

errors.name: PositionNotOpen
errors.msg: Position is not open

errors.name: BadPositionId
errors.msg: Position id must equal the user's current position counter

errors.name: NotLiquidatable
errors.msg: Position is not below the liquidation threshold

errors.name: OutOfStock
errors.msg: Listing is out of stock

errors.name: ListingMerchantMismatch
errors.msg: Listing does not belong to this merchant

errors.name: CouponTreeNotSet
errors.msg: Coupon tree is not configured yet; run the deploy script

errors.name: WrongCouponTree
errors.msg: Wrong merkle tree account for the configured coupon tree

errors.name: UnknownBadge
errors.msg: Unknown badge id

errors.name: BadgeNotEligible
errors.msg: Badge conditions not met

errors.name: BadgeAlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Badge already claimed

errors.name: StringTooLong
errors.msg: Provided string exceeds the maximum length

types.name: Config
docs: Global protocol configuration. Singleton PDA: seeds = ["config"].

fields.name: loyal_mint
docs: The single coalition-wide $LOYAL Token-2022 mint (PDA, authority = config).

fields.name: hook_program
docs: The transfer-hook program enforcing the closed loop.

fields.name: coupon_tree
docs: Bubblegum merkle tree used for coupon cNFTs (set post-deploy).

fields.name: fee_bps
docs: Settlement fee burned on position close, in basis points (e.g. 200 = 2%).

fields.name: max_leverage
docs: Maximum leverage allowed by governance (positions also restrict to {1,2,5}).

fields.name: max_position_stake
docs: Per-position stake ceiling (points).

fields.name: max_issue_per_tx
docs: Per-transaction issuance ceiling (points) — caps blast radius of a leaked QR signer.

fields.name: global_open_exposure
docs: Sum of `stake * leverage` across all open positions.

fields.name: max_global_exposure
docs: Hard cap on `global_open_exposure`; new positions are rejected above it.

fields.name: total_minted
docs: Lifetime points minted (issuance + winnings + bounties).

fields.name: total_burned
docs: Lifetime points burned (stakes, losses, fees, reward purchases).

fields.name: paused
docs: Emergency stop for all user-facing instructions.

types.name: IssuanceNonce
docs: Replay guard: `init` fails if the same (merchant, nonce) is used twice.
PDA: seeds = ["nonce", merchant, nonce_le_bytes].

types.name: Merchant
docs: One record per participating shop. PDA: seeds = ["merchant", authority].

fields.name: authority
docs: Wallet that manages this merchant (panel login key).

fields.name: qr_signer
docs: Off-chain QR signing key (ed25519). Kept separate from `authority`
so the hot key on the shop tablet can be rotated without re-registering.

fields.name: total_issued
docs: Lifetime points issued by this merchant.

fields.name: reward_budget
docs: Committed reward budget (points). Issuance is accounted against it;
MVP treats it as a counter, the economics doc explains settlement.

fields.name: listing_count
docs: Monotonic id source for this merchant's listings.

fields.name: coupons_redeemed
docs: Lifetime coupons redeemed at this merchant.

types.name: Position
docs: One synthetic position. Stake is burned on open and settlement is minted on
close — the position account itself is the escrow record.
PDA: seeds = ["position", user, vault, position_id_le].

fields.name: entry_price_1e6
docs: Entry price, 1e6 fixed point.

types.name: RedemptionReceipt
docs: Proof a coupon was consumed; the cNFT is burned in the same transaction.
PDA: seeds = ["receipt", asset_id].

types.name: RewardListing
docs: A merchant's reward offer. PDA: seeds = ["listing", merchant, listing_id_le].

fields.name: uri
docs: Off-chain metadata URI baked into the coupon cNFT.

types.name: RiskVault
docs: A synthetic-exposure vault tracking one Pyth feed. PDA: seeds = ["vault", symbol].

fields.name: pyth_feed_id
docs: Pyth price feed id (32 bytes, hex id from Hermes without 0x).

fields.name: open_exposure
docs: Sum of `stake * leverage` across open positions in this vault.

fields.name: positions_opened
docs: Lifetime positions opened, for stats.

types.name: UserProfile
docs: Per-wallet loyalty profile. PDA: seeds = ["user", wallet].

fields.name: tier
docs: 0 Bronze, 1 Silver, 2 Gold, 3 Degen.

fields.name: degen_score
docs: Cumulative realized PnL from the risk vaults (can go negative).

fields.name: position_count
docs: Monotonic id source for this user's positions.

fields.name: badge_eligible
docs: Bitmask of badge conditions the user has unlocked (see `Badge`).

fields.name: badges
docs: Bitmask of badges actually claimed (soulbound token minted).
